description: Style Note Updated summer style for your feet with catwalk's latest line. Inspired by the fresh fashion fetishes this season, this pair of sandals exemplify versatility - they look good with everything from smart formal day wear to breezy spring separates. Style them with an all-pastel coloured ensembles or a colour pop one, they go well with both! Product Description Silver thong style straps and thin synthetic strips criss-crossing across the midfoot and meeting at the heel collar (which has a zipper) Padded footbed with printed branding TPU outsole with a short lug at the heel Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
